benefits.description: Lost 50 lbs prior to starting compounded tirzepatide using intermittent fasting; user notes GLP-1 class medications reduce insulin response leading to fast fat burn

protocol_notes: Using compounded Tirzepatide at approximately $150/month. User previously lost 50 lbs using 36-hour alternate day fasting (1 lb per fast day). Notes father (83 years old) also lost 30 lbs using intermittent fasting. User also uses saffron extract pills and apple cider vinegar for hunger reduction.
